'''harava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelyonka|zelyonka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelyonka|zelyonka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| harava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hærævæth|hærævæth]] || [[word:hærævæj|hærævæj]] || [[word:hærævæsh|hærævæsh]] || [[word:hærævæ|hærævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hararavath|hararavath]] || [[word:hararavaj|hararavaj]] || [[word:hararavash|hararavash]] || [[word:hararava|hararava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:haravath|haravath]] || [[word:haravaj|haravaj]] || [[word:haravash|haravash]] || [[word:harava|harava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:harafvath|harafvath]] || [[word:harafvaj|harafvaj]] || [[word:harafvash|harafvash]] || [[word:harafvaf|harafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haravatha|haravatha]] || [[word:haravaja|haravaja]] || [[word:haravasha|haravasha]] || [[word:haravaka|haravaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haravath|haravath]] || [[word:haravaj|haravaj]] || [[word:haravash|haravash]] || [[word:harava|harava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haravathal|haravathal]] || [[word:haravajal|haravajal]] || [[word:haravashal|haravashal]] || [[word:haravakal|haravakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haravathatha|haravathatha]] || [[word:haravajaja|haravajaja]] || [[word:haravashasha|haravashasha]] || [[word:haravaka|haravaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haravathan|haravathan]] || [[word:haravajan|haravajan]] || [[word:haravashan|haravashan]] || [[word:haravakan|haravakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haravathaoro|haravathaoro]] || [[word:haravajaoro|haravajaoro]] || [[word:haravashaoro|haravashaoro]] || [[word:haravakaoro|haravakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
